texto: He had found many years ago before that if you kept very quiet people filled in the silences themselves,offering more information than they had originally intended to give.

texto: ‎"If the person you were fighting had any kind of wound,worry it and keep at it And the pain would be much more intense.It was the psychological angle and all.Once a cut was there,it was human nature to try to protect it from more harm.

texto: People only know what you tell them.And it was true.People gave out their whole life stories to anyone and everyone without a second's thought.Stand at a bus stop,sit in a strange pub,get banged up,and someone would always give you their life story.It was as if they were trying to prove they existed
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Martina Cole: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “People only know what you tell them.And it was true.People gave out their whole life stories to a…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, vida, people pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de people.
